name: Stock Book
feature: Monitor stock levels in real time including sold and remaining units.

name: Marketing
feature: Send bulk calls or SMS for offers, new products, and payment reminders.

name: Sell
feature: Quickly record every sale from your mobile phone and view daily sales clearly.

name: Product Returns
feature: Record customer or supplier product returns to keep stock accurate.

name: Expenses Book
feature: Record expenses like rent, electricity, transport, and salaries.

name: Cash Box
feature: Track all cash inflows and outflows and always know your available cash.

name: App Training & Support
feature: Access guides, video tutorials, and 24/7 customer support.

name: Purchase Book
feature: Track purchases by date, supplier, unit price, and quantity in an organized way.

name: Sales Book
feature: Store all sales by date, product, quantity, and price to track business accurately.

name: App Access
feature: Control employee access by allowing only selected features.

name: Recycle Bin
feature: Restore accidentally deleted sales, purchases, dues, and product data easily.

name: Product List
feature: Save product names, categories, prices, and barcodes securely.

name: Online Shop
feature: Create your own digital store where customers can view and order products.

name: Expire Product
feature: Get alerts for products that are nearing expiration.

name: Due Book
feature: View customer dues and send reminder SMS or calls instantly.

name: Due Payment Reminder Calls
feature: Send automatic payment reminder calls to customers with one click.

name: Warranty
feature: Store warranty details and track expiry dates easily.

name: Purchase
feature: Record every purchase with supplier, quantity, and cost in one place.

name: Business Reports
feature: Get daily, weekly, and monthly reports with profit and loss analysis.

name: Contacts
feature: Save customer and supplier details and send SMS directly.

name: Printer
feature: Print invoices, due slips, and reports using a Bluetooth printer.
